name: poller-crash-early
notes: The poller dies BEFORE assembly (SIGKILL at min 60, twenty nominal minutes before the T-10 freeze). The fixture is still base_ready with an approved fresh slice sitting in the row. The watchdog has to notice that kick-off has passed with nothing staged, assemble it BASE-ONLY, and release at the whistle. It must never ship the fresh questions: a dead poller means the veto ledger cannot be trusted end to end, so the conservative bound is the day-before, founder-approved base slate. The released pack must contain zero fresh questions.
